name: Potioneer: The VR Gardening Simulator
short_description: Potioneer: The VR Gardening simulator is a virtual reality game where players tend their virtual garden. Using the 3d visuals and room-scale tracking that HTC Vive provides, players explore the wilderness looking for plants and craft their home using wood, hammers, and nails.
detailed_description: Plant, nurture, and grow your garden in VR with Potioneer! Craft a home with your own two hands by hammering wood and nails! Express your creativity! Moving forward in Early Access, explore the countryside to discover new flora and collect valuable trinkets. Combine harvested materials into potions for special effects!
